content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column width=”1/6″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”2/3″]

Coal Preparation

In the area of coal preparation, Dr Kojovic led the JKMRC effort in developing a suite of process models, including Bradford breakers, rolls crushers and hammer mills, and degradation in handling. These models have recently been incorporated in a computer workbook aimed at optimising coal fragmentation for improved recovery. Dr Kojovic has extended the coal breakage models to include the liberation of ash, which represents a major breakthrough in simulation capability.

[/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/6″][/vc_column][/vc_row]
